title: Skamboni
description: Optimized Exploration modpack for a vanilla-like feel, but with tons of quality of life features and adventure oriented mods!
body:
Skamboni is a mod pack intended to deliver an optimized performance boost both for both client and server-side modpack enjoyers, while adding quality-of-life features and plenty of new content!

It's designed with mods such as Sodium, Iris and multiple other performance fixes and enhancements.

Skamboni adds content mods such as the RPG Series, Macaw's Building add-ons, and Adorn for the adventure and aesthetic lovers, while mods like Ad Astra and Applied Energetics are for the end game tech lovers!

Overhauled with Better Nether, Better End, and ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village mod, this modpack intends to be a Premium vanilla experience with some extra sparkle!
